description: Evaluates the correctness and quality of API endpoint implementations against their spec.

criteria.name: spec_compliance
criteria.description: Implementation matches all numbered requirements in the spec.

scoring.5: All requirements implemented exactly as specified.
scoring.4: All requirements implemented with minor deviations that do not affect correctness.
scoring.3: Most requirements implemented; one non-critical requirement missing or incorrect.
scoring.2: Several requirements missing or incorrectly implemented.
scoring.1: Fundamental requirements missing; implementation does not match spec.

criteria.name: error_handling
criteria.description: All error paths return appropriate HTTP status codes with structured error responses.

scoring.5: All error paths covered with correct status codes, structured error bodies, and request_id. No stack trace leakage.
scoring.4: All common error paths covered. Minor gaps in edge case handling.
scoring.3: Happy path and major error paths covered. Some error paths return generic 500.
scoring.2: Inconsistent error handling. Some errors unhandled or returning wrong status codes.
scoring.1: Minimal error handling. Unhandled exceptions propagate to caller.

criteria.name: input_validation
criteria.description: All inputs are validated at the API boundary with clear error messages.

scoring.5: All fields validated with type checks, constraints, and field-level error messages. Schema validation library used.
scoring.4: All required fields validated. Minor gaps in constraint validation.
scoring.3: Basic validation present but incomplete. Some fields not validated.
scoring.2: Minimal validation. Many fields accepted without checks.
scoring.1: No input validation. Raw input passed to business logic.

criteria.name: response_schema
criteria.description: Responses conform to the documented schema with correct data types and structure.

scoring.5: All responses match documented schema exactly. Consistent envelope structure.
scoring.4: Responses match schema with minor inconsistencies in optional fields.
scoring.3: Core response structure correct but some fields missing or mistyped.
scoring.2: Response structure deviates significantly from spec.

criteria.name: observability
criteria.description: Requests are logged with required fields and metrics are emitted.

scoring.5: Structured JSON logging with request_id, method, path, status_code, duration_ms. Metrics emitted.
scoring.4: Logging present with most required fields. Minor gaps.
scoring.3: Basic logging present but missing structured format or key fields.

criteria.name: test_coverage
criteria.description: Tests cover all acceptance criteria scenarios.

scoring.5: Tests cover all acceptance criteria including happy path, validation, auth, not found, and edge cases.
scoring.4: Tests cover happy path and major error cases. Minor gaps.
scoring.3: Tests cover happy path and one or two error cases.
scoring.1: No tests or tests do not exercise the endpoint.

output_format.overall_score: float 0-1 (weighted average of criteria scores normalized to 0-1)
output_format.criteria_scores: object mapping criteria name to { score: 1-5, reasoning: string }
